caption: A man with glasses, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and maroon tie, speaks directly to the camera against a blue background featuring a stylized world map. To his right is a circular graphic with the text "PLUS POLITICS". A red vertical banner on the left side of the frame displays the "plustv" logo. Across the bottom of the screen, a white banner reads "PLUS POLITICS" followed by the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". The bottom section of the screen contains a variety of call-to-action text and logos, including "SUBSCRIBE", "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE", "FOLLOW US", social media icons, and "PLUSTVAFRICA". The lower banner also lists viewing options such as "WATCH ON", "DStv CH 408", "StarTimes CH 308", "WATCH ONLINE", and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, with subtle changes in his facial expression and head position.
